# Let's read the file and print content with some markers
path = "/mnt/data/file-6jjZg6kG4XXpNWqu2WyJiK-text_to_analyse.txt"
try:
    with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
        raw = f.read()
        print("Length:", len(raw))
        # Show a snippet around the word 'قال النبي' if present
        idx = raw.find("قال النبي")
        print("Index of قال النبي:", idx)
        if idx != -1:
            print("Snippet around:", raw[idx-200: idx+600])
        # Also find the ayah quotes
        idx1 = raw.find("إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ")
        print("First ayah index:", idx1)
        idx2 = raw.find("إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ")
        print("Second ayah index:", idx2)
        # Print the quotes around the first ayah
        q1_start = raw.find('"', idx1-100)  # assume some preceding quotes
        if q1_start != -1:
            q1_end = raw.find('"', idx1, q1_start+1000)
            print("Quote around ayah 1 start-end indices:", q1_start, q1_end)
            print("Quoted ayah 1 text:", raw[q1_start+1:q1_end])
        # Print the quotes around the second ayah
        q2_start = raw.find('"', idx2-100)
        if q2_start != -1:
            q2_end = raw.find('"', q2_start+1)
            print("Quote around ayah 2 start-end indices:", q2_start, q2_end)
            print("Quoted ayah 2 text:", raw[q2_start+1:q2_end])
        # Let's search for the hadith opening
        hi = raw.find("قال النبي")
        print("Index of قال النبي:", hi)
        if hi != -1:
            # find the opening quote after this
            openq = raw.find('"', hi)
            print("Hadith open quote at:", openq)
            nextq = raw.find('"', openq+1)
            print("Hadith closing quote at:", nextq)
            print("Hadith text sample:", raw[openq+1:nextq])
            # We'll print more than one quotes block to ensure we capture entire hadith
            endblock = raw.find('"', nextq+1)
            print("Next quote after end:", endblock)
        # print a few quotes in the text
        all_quotes = [(i, j) for i in range(len(raw)) for j in range(i+1, len(raw)+1) if raw[i:j].count('"')==2][:5]
        print("Found candidate quoted substrings (First 5 by index):", all_quotes[:5])
except Exception as e:
    print("Error:", e)

path = "/mnt/data/file-6jjZg6kG4XXpNWqu2WyJiK-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
pos1 = raw.find("إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ")
pos2 = raw.find("إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ")
print("pos1:", pos1, "text1:", raw[pos1:pos1+len(\"إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ\")])
print("pos2:", pos2, "text2 excerpt:", raw[pos2:pos2+len(\"إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ\")])
# Now hadith: find 'قال النبي' index and quotes around the matn
idx = raw.find("قال النبي")
print("قال النبي index:", idx)
openq = raw.find('"', idx)
print("open quote at:", openq)
if openq != -1:
    closeq = raw.find('"', openq+1)
    print("close quote at:", closeq)
    hadith_span = raw[openq+1:closeq]
    print("Hadith matn length:", len(hadith_span))
    # Print first 200 chars
    print("Hadith start:", hadith_span[:200])
    print("Hadith end excerpt:", hadith_span[-200:])
else:
    print("No hadith quotes found")

path = "/mnt/data/file-6jjZg6kG4XXpNWqu2WyJiK-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
text1 = "إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ"
text2 = "إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ"
pos1 = raw.find(text1)
pos2 = raw.find(text2)
print("pos1:", pos1)
print("pos2:", pos2)
print("Snippet1:", raw[pos1:pos1+len(text1)])
print("Snippet2:", raw[pos2:pos2+len(text2)])

idx = raw.find("قال النبي")
print("قال النبي index:", idx)
openq = raw.find('"', idx)
print("open quote at:", openq)
closeq = raw.find('"', openq+1)
print("close quote at:", closeq)
hadith_span = raw[openq+1:closeq]
print("Hadith sample len:", len(hadith_span))
print("Hadith sample start:", hadith_span[:200])
print("Hadith sample end:", hadith_span[-200:])

# Compute the actual spans properly using robust method
path = "/mnt/data/file-6jjZg6kG4XXpNWqu2WyJiK-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
text1 = "إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ"
text2 = "إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ"
pos1 = raw.find(text1)
pos2 = raw.find(text2)
start1, end1 = pos1, pos1 + len(text1)
start2, end2 = pos2, pos2 + len(text2)
idx = raw.find("قال النبي")
openq = raw.find('"', idx)
closeq = raw.find('"', openq+1)
start_hadith = openq + 1
end_hadith = closeq if closeq != -1 else len(raw)
span_hadith = raw[start_hadith:end_hadith]
start_hadith, end_hadith, len(span_hadith)

start1, end1 = pos1, pos1 + len("إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ")
start2, end2 = pos2, pos2 + len("إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ")
start1, end1, start2, end2

start_hadith=399
end_hadith=2800
span_hadith_full = raw[start_hadith:end_hadith]
span_hadith_full[:50], span_hadith_full[-50:], len(span_hadith_full)

# verify the actual characters at the claimed indices
print("raw[111:199]=", raw[111:199])
print("raw[249:336]=", raw[249:336])
print("raw[399:405]=", raw[399:405])
print("Text1 exact from raw:", raw[start1:end1])
print("Text2 exact from raw:", raw[start2:end2])
print("Span H length", end_hadith - start_hadith, "start_hadith", start_hadith, "end_hadith", end_hadith)

print("raw[111:198]=", raw[111:198])
print("raw[111:199]=", raw[111:199])
print("Character at 198:", raw[198])
print("Character at 199:", raw[199])

print("raw[249:335]=", raw[249:335])
print("chr at 335", raw[335] if len(raw) > 335 else "no char")
print("raw[249:336]=", raw[249:336])

span_hadith = raw[399:2800]
print("span_hadith len", len(span_hadith))
print(span_hadith[:50])
print(span_hadith[-50:])

# Check if hadith_span contains newline characters
has_newline = "\n" in span_hadith_full
has_carriage = "\r" in span_hadith_full
print("Has newline in hadith span:", has_newline, "Has CR:", has_carriage)
# Show if there are newline characters:
# count newline occurrences
span_hadith_full.count("\n"), span_hadith_full.count("\r")

start_hadith = 399
end_hadith = 2800
span_hadith_full = raw[start_hadith:end_hadith]
len(span_hadith_full), span_hadith_full[:150], span_hadith_full[-150:]

import json

# Build the dictionary
text1 = "إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ"
text2 = "إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ"
start1, end1 = 111, 198
start2, end2 = 249, 335
start_hadith, end_hadith = 399, 2800
span_hadith = raw[start_hadith:end_hadith]
payload = {
    "citations": [
        {"span_start": start1, "span_end": end1, "span_text": text1, "citation_type": "Aya"},
        {"span_start": start2, "span_end": end2, "span_text": text2, "citation_type": "Aya"},
        {"span_start": start_hadith, "span_end": end_hadith, "span_text": span_hadith, "citation_type": "Hadith"},
    ]
}
print(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

# print the hadith span as a single line for copying
print(span_hadith_full)
